reasons: Diggie protects allies from Guinevere's crowd-control chain and reduces the value of her airborne combo.
Guinevere relies on confirmed setup, while Diggie makes the follow-up less reliable.

proof.summary: Guinevere wants to knock targets airborne and burst with her ultimate, while Diggie can cleanse and protect nearby allies during the setup window.
worksBestWhen: Diggie saves Time Journey for Guinevere's real engage.
Diggie stays near the teammate Guinevere wants to catch.
failureCases: Guinevere baits Diggie ultimate before committing.

reasons: Khufra can punish Guinevere's jump engage if she relies on movement to start the combo.
Bouncing Ball makes it risky for Guinevere to enter through predictable paths.

proof.summary: Guinevere wants to start fights through jump movement, while Khufra's Bouncing Ball can punish blink or dash attempts near him.
worksBestWhen: Khufra holds Bouncing Ball until Guinevere commits.
Khufra positions near Guinevere's preferred target.
failureCases: Guinevere enters from fog before Khufra reacts.

reasons: Wanwan can remove control effects from herself and reposition, which can break Guinevere's airborne combo timing.
This counter is execution-dependent because Wanwan must react before Guinevere completes the burst sequence.

proof.summary: Guinevere wants to chain airborne control into burst, while Wanwan can self-cleanse and reposition if she times the response correctly.
worksBestWhen: Wanwan saves Needles in Flowers for Guinevere's real setup.
Wanwan avoids standing where Guinevere's jump can be easily predicted.
failureCases: Guinevere catches Wanwan before she reacts.
Wanwan wastes cleanse before Guinevere commits.

reasons: Franco can suppress Guinevere before she starts her combo or after she overcommits.
Suppression is valuable because Guinevere can be hard to interrupt during some combo windows.

proof.summary: Guinevere wants to enter and burst through a chained combo, while Franco can suppress her and stop the setup or punish the failed engage.
worksBestWhen: Franco saves Bloody Hunt for Guinevere's commit.
failureCases: Guinevere catches Franco before he reacts.
Franco suppresses after Guinevere has already completed her burst.

reasons: Valir can push Guinevere away before she gets a clean engage angle.
His self-cleanse timing also helps him survive if Guinevere tries to start the combo on him.

proof.summary: Guinevere wants to close distance for airborne setup, while Valir can knock her back and use cleanse timing to avoid being locked.
worksBestWhen: Valir saves knockback for Guinevere's jump.
Valir avoids predictable positions near walls or bushes.
failureCases: Guinevere engages from fog before Valir reacts.
Valir wastes knockback before Guinevere commits.
